title: FLOSS Weekly 484: The Lounge
summary:
The Lounge is a modern web IRC client designed to be self-hosted. Al McKinlay is a web software consultant and enjoys writing small, functional software. He is also an amateur podcaster! Jeremie Astorie is a full stack web developer and project member of the Chai assertion library and contributor to ~100 projects.
Download or subscribe to this show at https://twit.tv/shows/floss-weekly
Here's what's coming up for FLOSS in the future.
Think your open source project should be on FLOSS Weekly? Email Randal at merlyn@stonehenge.com
Thanks to CacheFly for providing the bandwidth for this podcast and Lullabot's Jeff Robbins, web designer and musician, for our theme music.
